name: migration-guard
description: A behavior-consistency guardrail CLI for refactoring and migration work.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/core/normalize.test.js dist/core/checkNormalize.test.js dist/core/config.test.js dist/core/compare.test.js dist/core/diffDecision.test.js dist/core/files.test.js dist/core/patch.test.js dist/core/repairLoopCli.test.js dist/core/taskGraph.test.js
